Notice Of Motion To Quash, To Vacate Hearing Dates, For Any Proper Relief
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT PAUL GARIBOLDI's Motion To Quash, To Vacate Hearing Dates and For Any Proper Relief IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Service of summons is quashed and hearing dates are vacated. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189(301/PJB)
